title: Just Who Is Jakub Mensik?
description: Who Is He? title: Despite visible scares, Jakub Mensik declares himself healthy
description: Mensik had a scare during the match itself, feeling discomfort in his left leg late in the second set that disrupted his serve. "I was afraid what it was," he said to the press.

title: Zverev shakes off a slow opening to dispatch Jodar in straight sets and reach his 5th Roland-Garros semi-finals
description: Alexander Zverev (No 2) beat 19-year-old Rafael Jodar 7-6(3), 6-1, 6-3 on Court Philippe-Chatrier — his 5th Roland-Garros semi-final, his 11th Grand Slam semi-final. The match turned on a 10-point run from 2-5 down in the first set. After that, Jodar didn't break Zverev again and lost his own serve four times. Fonseca or Mensik next, with the German two wins from a first Grand Slam title.
